calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Summary Of Case Pursuant To Crc 3.1800(A} (Judgments)
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings Not Reported.

Plaintiff Urban Point SF, LLC. is represented by Leonard Mastromonaco, Esq.
Defendant Current Foods, Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Wicked Foods, Inc. not appearing

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orlando Garcia, and against Defendant Wai Lau, as follows:

1. Damages: $2,085,306.84
2. Prejudgment Interest: $8,396.12
3. Costs: $2,244.73
4. Attorney fees: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $2,095,947.69

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
